description: Corrected stance coding for five deepfakes-fraud entries (pos-0438, pos-2228, pos-2348, pos-2618, pos-0588) to align with the convention that Oppose = opposes deepfakes and Support = supports/minimizes concern. Updated pos-0354 (rouzer-david, data-centers) from Oppose to Mixed. Changed pos-2991 (bennett-chris, export-control) to No-Mention and N/A due to a mismatch between the topic and summary.
